task_completion.description: Set the email template name to 'Warranty Claim Response'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Name' input field or saved record title containing exactly 'Warranty Claim Response'.
Look for a 'Description' input field or saved text containing 'Standard response template for warranty claim cases'.

task_completion.description: Set the email template subject with the case number variable
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Subject' input field containing 'Re: Your Warranty Claim - Case #$acase_case_number'.

task_completion.description: Include the contact first name variable in the body greeting
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the email body text area containing 'Dear $contact_first_name,'.

task_completion.description: Include the case number variable and timeline in the body
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the email body text area containing 'Case #$acase_case_number' and the phrase '2 business days'.

task_completion.description: Include the correct signoff in the body
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the email body text area ending with 'Customer Support Team'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to create the template
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the template into a local text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields and text areas must be part of the SuiteCRM 'Create Email Template' or 'Edit' web page, not Notepad, gedit, or similar.

integrity.description: The agent attempted to save the template in the CRM
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking a 'Save' button or a success message indicating the template was created/saved in SuiteCRM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected template name is 'Warranty Claim Response', and the description must be 'Standard response template for warranty claim cases'. The subject must use the merge variable '$acase_case_number'. The body must contain the literal merge variables '$contact_first_name' and '$acase_case_number', include a timeline of '2 business days', and end with the signoff 'Customer Support Team'.
